# metainfo

[![bnpm](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/v/@byted-service/metainfo.svg?style=flat-square)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/metainfo) [![download](https://2y8ngapf.fn.bytedance.net/d?p=@byted-service/metainfo)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/metainfo)

[简体中文](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/metainfo/README.md) | [English](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/metainfo/README.en.md) | [CHANGELOG](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/metainfo/CHANGELOG.md)

This library aligns with `golang`'s `metainfo` library. For specific documents, please see https://code.byted.org/gopkg/metainfo

> If the version is 1.0.2 and below, please upgrade in time to avoid unknown compatibility bugs.
> Please read this document before use. https://bytedance.feishu.cn/wiki/wikcn2L5x9IgQ4iLEdHofSMPVQc#

## Installation

```bash
npm install @byted-service/metainfo --registry=http://bnpm.byted.org
```

## Quick start

```ts
import * as MetaInfo from '@byted-service/metainfo';

const ctx = {};

// Write save chain information in the upstream service call
MetaInfo.withValue(ctx, 'ROLE', 'AppUser');

// call getValue in downstream service to get call chain information
MetaInfo.getValue(ctx, 'ROLE'); // "AppUser"
```

## API

### MetaInfo.getValue(ctx, k)

Get the `transient` data of the specified `key` ( including `transient-upstream` data ).

### MetaInfo.getAllValues(ctx)

Get all `transient` data ( including `transient-upstream` data ).

### MetaInfo.withValue(ctx, k, v)

Set `transient` data.

### MetaInfo.delValue(ctx, k)

Delete the `transient` data of the specified `key`.

### MetaInfo.getPersistentValue(ctx, k)

Get the `persistent` data of the specified `key`.

### MetaInfo.getAllPersistentValues(ctx)

Get all `persistent` data.

### MetaInfo.withPersistentValue(ctx, k, v)

Set `persistent` data.

### MetaInfo.delPersistentValue(ctx, k)

Delete the `persistent` data of the specified `key`.

### MetaInfo.transferForward(ctx)

Forward pass, used to convert `transient` data from upstream into `transient-upstream` data, and filter out the original `transient-upstream` data.

### MetaInfo.setMetaInfoFromMap(ctx, m)

Save the `metainfo` data in `ctx` to the object for the client to transfer `metainfo` data.

### MetaInfo.saveMetaInfoToMap(ctx, m)

Save the `metainfo` data in the object to `ctx` for the server to receive `metainfo` data.

### MetaInfo.hasMetaInfo(ctx)

Determine whether there is `metainfo` data in `ctx`.

### MetaInfo.delMetaInfo(ctx)

Delete the `metainfo` data in `ctx`.

### MetaInfo.copyMetaInfo(fromCtx, toCtx)

Copy `metainfo` data.

### MetaInfo.HTTPHeaderToCGIVariable(key)

Convert `HTTP Header` to `CGI key`.

### MetaInfo.CGIVariableToHTTPHeader(key)

Convert `CGI key` to `HTTP Header`.

### MetaInfo.fromHTTPHeader(ctx, h)

Obtain `metainfo` from `HTTP Header`.

### MetaInfo.toHTTPHeader(ctx, h)

Obtain `HTTP Header` from `metainfo`.

### MetaInfo.withBackwardValues(ctx)

Initialize `backward` data.

### MetaInfo.recvBackwardValue(ctx, key)

Get the `backward` data of the specified `key`.

### MetaInfo.recvAllBackwardValues(ctx)

Get all the `backward` data.

### MetaInfo.setBackwardValue(ctx, key, val)

Set `backward` data.

### MetaInfo.setBackwardValues(ctx, key, val, key, val, ...)

Batch set `backward` data.

### MetaInfo.setBackwardValuesFromMap(ctx, kvs)

Batch set `backward` data.

### MetaInfo.withBackwardValuesToSend(ctx)

Initialize `backward` data ( `send` ).

### MetaInfo.sendBackwardValue(ctx, key, val)

Set `backward` data ( `send` ).

### MetaInfo.sendBackwardValues(ctx, key, val, key, val, ...)

Batch set `backward` data ( `send` ).

### MetaInfo.sendBackwardValuesFromMap(ctx, kvs)

Batch set `backward` data ( `send` ).

### MetaInfo.allBackwardValuesToSend(ctx, kvs)

Get all the `backward` data ( `send` ).

### MetaInfo.turnOffDoubleWrite()

Turn off double write.

### MetaInfo.turnOnDoubleWrite()

Turn on double write.

## Version compatible

In `version number <= 1.0.2`, the golang metainfo library is not aligned due to historical reasons, and due to its own implementation problems, there are bugs, as follows:

```ts
import * as MetaInfo from '@byted-service/metainfo';

const ctx = {};

MetaInfo.saveTransitValue(ctx, { AAA: 'AAA' });

MetaInfo.getTransitValue(ctx, 'AAA'); // null ???
```

In the current version, the dual-write mode is used to be compatible with the mixed use of new and old versions. But the double write mode itself has certain performance problems, so if you can ensure that the version of `@byted-service/metainfo in the project is all> 1.0.2`, then you can use `MetaInfo.turnOffDoubleWrite()` or set the environment variable `METAINFO_DOUBLE_WRITE = false` to turn off double write mode
